assumptions: The target lane is resolved as AbsoluteTargetLane value="-1".

request: Generate a VTD OpenSCENARIO case on an urban road in China: ego vehicle starts at 30 km/h; the scenario trigger is simulation time 5 seconds; at that trigger the ego vehicle performs a lane change to the left by one lane; the simulation stops at 20 seconds. Keep the XML minimal but schema-valid.

tool_call_summary.purpose: Collected initial scenario intent, schema plan, VTD plan, naming plan, validation plan, and open target-lane question before drafting.
Queried VTD runtime naming context for ego in a China urban OpenSCENARIO case.
Queried VTD runtime asset candidates for the ego naming context.
Retrieved element evidence for ScenarioObject before drafting.
Retrieved schema details for ScenarioObject before drafting.
Retrieved element evidence for Vehicle before drafting.
Retrieved schema details for Vehicle before drafting.
Retrieved element evidence for Storyboard before drafting.
Retrieved schema details for Storyboard before drafting.
Retrieved element evidence for LaneChangeAction before drafting.
Retrieved schema details for LaneChangeAction before drafting.
Retrieved element evidence for SimulationTimeCondition before drafting.
Retrieved schema details for SimulationTimeCondition before drafting.
Validated the drafted full OpenSCENARIO XML against schema version 1.4.0.
Checked final XML against the required intent JSON and checklist.

xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<OpenSCENARIO>
  <FileHeader revMajor="1" revMinor="4" date="2026-05-19T00:00:00" description="China urban ego lane change left at 5 seconds" author="claude_code_gpt"/>
  <CatalogLocations/>
  <RoadNetwork/>
  <Entities>
    <ScenarioObject name="ego">
      <Vehicle name="ego_vehicle" vehicleCategory="car">
        <BoundingBox>
          <Center x="1.5" y="0.0" z="0.9"/>
          <Dimensions width="1.8" length="4.5" height="1.8"/>
        </BoundingBox>
        <Performance maxSpeed="69.444" maxAcceleration="10.0" maxDeceleration="10.0"/>
        <Axles>
          <FrontAxle maxSteering="0.5" wheelDiameter="0.6" trackWidth="1.6" positionX="3.0" positionZ="0.3"/>
          <RearAxle maxSteering="0.0" wheelDiameter="0.6" trackWidth="1.6" positionX="0.0" positionZ="0.3"/>
        </Axles>
      </Vehicle>
    </ScenarioObject>
  </Entities>
  <Storyboard>
    <Init>
      <Actions>
        <Private entityRef="ego">
          <PrivateAction>
            <LongitudinalAction>
              <SpeedAction>
                <SpeedActionDynamics dynamicsShape="step" value="0.0" dynamicsDimension="time"/>
                <SpeedActionTarget>
                  <AbsoluteTargetSpeed value="8.333333"/>
                </SpeedActionTarget>
              </SpeedAction>
            </LongitudinalAction>
          </PrivateAction>
        </Private>
      </Actions>
    </Init>
    <Story name="LaneChangeStory">
      <Act name="LaneChangeAct">
        <ManeuverGroup name="LaneChangeGroup" maximumExecutionCount="1">
          <Actors selectTriggeringEntities="false">
            <EntityRef entityRef="ego"/>
          </Actors>
          <Maneuver name="LaneChangeManeuver">
            <Event name="LaneChangeEvent" priority="overwrite">
              <Action name="LaneChangeLeft">
                <PrivateAction>
                  <LateralAction>
                    <LaneChangeAction>
                      <LaneChangeActionDynamics dynamicsShape="sinusoidal" value="3.0" dynamicsDimension="time"/>
                      <LaneChangeTarget>
                        <AbsoluteTargetLane value="-1"/>
                      </LaneChangeTarget>
                    </LaneChangeAction>
                  </LateralAction>
                </PrivateAction>
              </Action>
              <StartTrigger>
                <ConditionGroup>
                  <Condition name="StartAtFiveSeconds" delay="0.0" conditionEdge="rising">
                    <ByValueCondition>
                      <SimulationTimeCondition value="5.0" rule="greaterOrEqual"/>
                    </ByValueCondition>
                  </Condition>
                </ConditionGroup>
              </StartTrigger>
            </Event>
          </Maneuver>
        </ManeuverGroup>
        <StartTrigger>
          <ConditionGroup>
            <Condition name="ActStartAtFiveSeconds" delay="0.0" conditionEdge="rising">
              <ByValueCondition>
                <SimulationTimeCondition value="5.0" rule="greaterOrEqual"/>
              </ByValueCondition>
            </Condition>
          </ConditionGroup>
        </StartTrigger>
        <StopTrigger/>
      </Act>
    </Story>
    <StopTrigger>
      <ConditionGroup>
        <Condition name="StopAtTwentySeconds" delay="0.0" conditionEdge="rising">
          <ByValueCondition>
            <SimulationTimeCondition value="20.0" rule="greaterOrEqual"/>
          </ByValueCondition>
        </Condition>
      </ConditionGroup>
    </StopTrigger>
  </Storyboard>
</OpenSCENARIO>
